title: Multi-Agent Delegation, Context Minimization, Merge, and Failure Containment · Language Clinic: Delegate Contract
summary: A coordinator sends full user context and credentials to many agents, gives them shared write tools, accepts unvalidated summaries, and amplifies one poisoned result across the system. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the delegate contract increment in typed contained delegation graph. Learners progress through prediction, explicit t…
objectives: Define delegated goal, inputs, outputs, non-goals, authority, tools, budget, deadline, evidence, stop, and escalation in a typed contract.
Use delegation only when specialized context, independent work, isolation, or ownership beats a simpler function, workflow, tool, or single agent.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-multi-agent-delegation-3
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-multi-agent-delegation-3.
# Case 5798: a keyboard and screen-reader interaction review.
# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: change one tool call, argument, authority, result, or failure and preserve correlation.
def worked_agentpy_multi_agent_delegation_3(delegated_tasks: int = 18, accepted_results: int = 12, rejected_results: int = 6, minimized_contexts: int = 18, cascading_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked3 = "worked3-3dekrow-5798"
    assert evidence_variant_worked3
    evidence_axes_worked3 = (
        "authorityworked3",
        "interaction5798",
        "tool3dekrow",
        "stateworked35798",
        "evaluation5798worked3",
        "recovery3dekrow5798",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked3)) == 6
    if delegated_tasks < 6 or accepted_results < 0 or rejected_results < 0:
        return False, delegated_tasks, "delegation-count"
    if accepted_results + rejected_results != delegated_tasks:
        return False, accepted_results, "delegation-reconciliation"
    if minimized_contexts != delegated_tasks:
        return False, minimized_contexts, "delegation-context"
    if cascading_failures > 0:
        return False, cascading_failures, "delegation-cascade"
    assert accepted_results + rejected_results == delegated_tasks and cascading_failures == 0
    return True, accepted_results, "contained-agent-delegation"

# Operating constraint: every external effect requires explicit least-authority policy.
# Changed case: replace trusted context with untrusted indirect instructions and preserve data-versus-instruction boundaries.
def evidence_agentpy_delegate_contract_21ecff(delegated_tasks: int = 18, accepted_results: int = 12, rejected_results: int = 6, minimized_contexts: int = 18, cascading_failures: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_21ecff = "21ecff-ffce12-4220"
    assert evidence_variant_21ecff
    evidence_axes_21ecff = (
        "authority21ecff",
        "interaction4220",
        "toolffce12",
        "state21ecff4220",
        "evaluation422021ecff",
        "recoveryffce124220",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_21ecff)) == 6
    if delegated_tasks < 6 or accepted_results < 0 or rejected_results < 0:
        return False, delegated_tasks, "delegation-count"
    if accepted_results + rejected_results != delegated_tasks:
        return False, accepted_results, "delegation-reconciliation"
    if minimized_contexts != delegated_tasks:
        return False, minimized_contexts, "delegation-context"
    if cascading_failures > 0:
        return False, cascading_failures, "delegation-cascade"
    assert accepted_results + rejected_results == delegated_tasks and cascading_failures == 0
    return True, accepted_results, "contained-agent-delegation"
